one_time_description: CIBC 1906 Land Claim loan proceeds of $19,079,633 recognized as revenue; also gain on disposal of investments of $2,504,152
economic_notes: Nation operates Paskwa Pit Stop (convenience/gas), PFN Group of Companies LP (includes Pro Metal Industries Ltd.), PFN Group of Companies Inc., and has investments in Atlas Biotechnologies Inc., Pasqua Business Trust, Keseechiwan Holdings LP, and Pasqua TLE Holdings Inc. Land lease revenues from PFN Land Acquisition LP. Tire sales and installation through PFN GOC LP.
notes: Fiscal year end March 31, 2022 — statements signed May 2023, over a year late. Major one-time item: $19,079,633 from CIBC 1906 Land Claim loan proceeds recognized as revenue, plus $2,504,152 gain on disposal of investments. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative deferred revenue of $8,844,267 and Other band revenue land purchase deferred $4,500,000 contributed to large deferred revenue balance of $28.16M. Consolidated entities: Paskwa Pit Stop, PFN Group of Companies LP (includes Pro Metal Industries Ltd.), PFN Group of Companies Inc. GBE on modified equity basis: Pasqua TLE Holdings Inc. TLE Trust and Pasqua First Nation Legacy Trust excluded from consolidation. Capital contribution of $2,590,279 from Pasqua Business Trust recorded directly to accumulated surplus. Accumulated surplus on Statement of Accumulated Surplus shows $45,534,896 while balance sheet shows $45,534,905 — minor rounding discrepancy in source document.
